---
title: "Jin Liu"
image: "Photo/证件照.jpeg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: ji1596@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/Jin-Liu
---

## Welcome!

### MSBA Student | Business Analytics | Data-Driven Decision Making

Hi, I'm Jin Liu.

I am currently pursuing a Master of Science in Business Analytics at UC San Diego, with a strong interest in applying data-driven approaches to solve real-world business problems and generate actionable insights.

---

[👤 About Me](about.qmd)

[📄 View Resume](Resume.qmd)

[📊 View Projects](projects.qmd)
